trivia_bullets.text: Staff of the Death Magus (no. 219) is the black member of the complete five-card 'Staff of the Magus' cycle in Magic 2014, occupying consecutive collector numbers 219-223: Death (black/Swamp), Flame (red/Mountain), Mind (blue/Island), Sun (white/Plains), Wild (green/Forest). All five were first printed in M14, released 2013-07-19. Staff of the Flame Magus and Staff of the Mind Magus were later reprinted in Magic 2015 (M15); the Death, Sun, and Wild staffs were not.
sources: Scryfall: collector numbers and reprint fields for nos. 219-223, M14

trivia_bullets.text: The lifegain trigger fires separately for spells AND lands, meaning a black ramp deck dropping Swamps gains life on both axes. Non-basic lands lacking the Swamp subtype (e.g., Caves of Koilos) do not trigger the staff, despite producing black mana.

"A symbol of ambition in ruthless times." — no attributed speaker. The terse parallel structure across the cycle (ambition/conviction/ferocity, each in [adjective] times) is the flavor-text design motif tying all five cards together as a unified in-world motto set.
Artist Daniel Ljunggren illustrated three of the five staff cycle cards in M14 (Death, Sun, Wild — nos. 219, 222, 223). Ljunggren has 191 credited MTG card illustrations.
EDHREC rank 8,060 — the highest of the three M14 staffs in this batch and the most Commander-played of the group, likely in lifegain-matters black decks (Oloro, Vito, Liesa, etc.).

cycle_flag: STAFF_OF_THE_MAGUS_M14 — all 5 members confirmed in M14 (nos. 219-223). Edgelord should commission cohort node after this batch. CORRECTION for batch instructions: Flame (220) and Mind (221) originate in M14, not M15. They were reprinted in M15 but are not M15-exclusive.
